title: Rose
description: A rose tattoo often represents love and beauty, but it can also symbolize grief, remembrance, or personal growth depending on color and design

title: Anchor
description: Anchor tattoos are commonly associated with stability and staying grounded, often used by sailors as a symbol of safety and hope.

title: Snake
description: Snakes symbolize transformation and renewal due to shedding their skin, but can also represent danger or temptation

title: Butterfly
description: Butterflies are a common symbol of personal transformation, growth, and freedom, often tied to life changes.

title: Lion
description: Lion tattoos represent bravery, power, and leadership, often chosen to symbolize inner strength.

title: Murphy’s Law
shortMeaning: Anything that can go wrong will go wrong
description: Murphy’s Law highlights how things tend to fail at the worst possible moment. It’s often used to explain bad luck or why planning for errors is important.

title: Parkinson’s Law
shortMeaning: Work expands to fill the time available
description: If you give yourself a week to finish a task, it will take a week—even if it could be done in a day. Deadlines strongly affect productivity.

title: Pareto Principle(80/20)
shortMeaning: 80% of results come from 20% of effort
description: A small portion of inputs often produces most of the results. Commonly used in business, productivity, and problem-solving.

title: Occam’s Razor
shortMeaning: The simplest explanation is usually correct
description: When faced with multiple explanations, the one with the fewest assumptions is most likely to be true.

title: Hanlon’s Razor
shortMeaning: Don’t attribute to malice what can be explained by stupidity
description: People often assume bad intent when mistakes are more likely due to ignorance or error.

title: Hofstadter’s Law
shortMeaning: Everything takes longer than you expect
description: Even when accounting for delays, tasks tend to take more time than planned.

title: Goodhart’s Law
shortMeaning: When a measure becomes a target, it stops being useful
description: Metrics lose meaning when people optimize specifically for them instead of the actual goal.

title: Cunningham’s Law
shortMeaning: The best way to get the right answer is to post the wrong one
description: On the internet, incorrect statements often get corrected faster than questions get answered.

title: Peter Principle
shortMeaning: People are promoted to their level of incompetence
description: Employees tend to rise until they reach a role where they are no longer competent.

title: Law of Diminishing Returns
shortMeaning: More effort yields smaller gains over time
description: After a certain point, adding more effort or resources produces progressively less benefit.
